The residence

Élodie

A first-floor two-bedroom residence of over 144 square metres gross with a private patio — family scale in the stone-built village quarter of Green Coast, Palasë. Two proper bedrooms, a broad living room and the resort's plaza, pools and Blue Flag beach at the door.

Explore the residence

Walk it, room by room

Tap any room on the plan to see its size.

Position within Green Coast

Where Élodie sits

Élodie sits at the heart of the village, on the lanes just west of the pedestrian spine. The parking entrance is directly below, the central plaza and the hotel a short walk east, and the paths down to the beach begin at the village edge.

Location & setting

Life at Green Coast

Green Coast is the Albanian Riviera's most established resort address — a stone-built village above the Blue Flag beach at Palasë, where the Ceraunian mountains meet the Ionian. Mediterranean architecture in local stone, travertine and timber; promenades, pools, restaurants and a beach club below; the life of the coast a few steps from the door.

The heart of the village, off the pedestrian spine
